true_positives.golden_comment: The code uses forEach with async callbacks, which causes asynchronous operations (e.g., calendar/video event deletions, payment refunds) to run concurrently without being awaited. This 'fire-and-forget' behavior leads to unhandled promise rejections, race conditions, and incomplete cleanup, as surrounding try-catch blocks cannot properly handle errors from these unawaited promises. Replace forEach with for...of loops or Promise.all() with map() to ensure proper sequential execution and error handling.
